## Verification Gate

- [ ] User stories drafted in `docs/userstories/<phase>/` and **APPROVED** by user
- [ ] UML diagrams drafted in `docs/uml/<phase>/` and **APPROVED** by user
- [ ] `make lint` is green
- [ ] `make test` is green
- [ ] `make smoke` is green (or marked N/A)
- [ ] Commits are Conventional Commits, one logical step each
- [ ] No secrets, no `print`, no new deps without `pyproject.toml` update
